title: ImagineHack 2025
description: A flagship hackathon that challenges participants to ideate, innovate, and develop impactful technology solutions while collaborating with like-minded creators and industry mentors.

title: NexTech Conference & Exhibition
description: Agents of Tech's signature 2-day conference-exhibition hybrid. Workshops, tech talks, and booths by 20+ leading tech companies. Taylor's University Grand Hall, 27-28 April. RM10K+ prizes!

title: ImagineHack 2023
description: "Reimagining with Artificial Intelligence" – Taylor's most prestigious 48-hour hackathon. RM7000+ prize pool. Teams built unique web solutions from scratch.

title: ImagineHack 2021
description: 48-hour Web Development hackathon. Teams of 1-3 university students built websites from scratch. Discord + Zoom. UN SDGs themes: Geofencing, Sustainable Smart City.
